name: braintrust
description: Turn your scattered user research into an evidence-graded running analysis, then pressure-test product ideas against it. braintrust-setup finds where your user knowledge lives; braintrust-ingest copies sources into a project-local braintrust/ store and grades every claim usable / borderline / discount with a calibrated Mom Test lens, flagging where the judge is unsure and where weak signals converge across segments so you can judge them in context; braintrust-ask judges whether users actually want an idea, citing specific quotes, provenance, and gaps. Zero backend; runs entirely in your Claude Code session.
